OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

params._reactivityPrecompile: Somnia Reactivity Precompile address                              (0x0100 on mainnet; mock address in tests).
params._vault: REFLEXVault address whose events we watch.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.coverage: The maximum STT amount this policy will pay out.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

initializeSubscription().notice: Owner-callable lazy initialization for the Reactivity subscription.         Use this if the constructor could not subscribe (e.g. precompile         not yet live on the current network).

purchaseCoverage(uint256).notice: Purchase insurance coverage for your vault position.

withdrawPool(uint256).notice: Safety valve — owner can withdraw excess pool funds.

userdoc.notice: Autonomous insurance pool for REFLEX positions.         This contract subscribes — via Somnia Reactivity — to the vault's         ProtectionTriggered event. When the vault's reactive handler fires         and emits ProtectionTriggered, the Reactivity Precompile fires THIS         contract's handler in the same block. No keeper. No offchain relay.
